zh.lifeSummary: 當Adria Hoare於1604年8月25日之前出生在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利時，她的父親Thomas Hoare34歲，母親Julyan Tripplett32歲。她於1624年與Capt Thomas Harris Sr結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1635年11月11日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adria Hoare于1604年8月25日之前出生在英国巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利时，她的父亲Thomas Hoare34岁，母亲Julyan Tripplett32岁。她于1624年与Capt Thomas Harris Sr结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1635年11月11日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪。

nameMeanings.name: Hoare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hoar
meanings: nickname from Middle English hor(e) ‘gray- or white-haired’ (Old English hār). This name has been established in Ireland since the late 13th century and was Gaelicized as de Hóir and de Hóra.
habitational name from Ore (Sussex), or else a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) bank’, from Middle English or(e) ‘brink, edge’ (Old English ōra).

nameMeanings.name: Adria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Rare feminine form of   Adrian  , recorded in the 17th century.

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Adria Hoare was born before 25 August 1604, in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Thomas Hoare, was 34 and her mother, Julyan Tripplett, was 32. She married Capt Thomas Harris Sr in 1624. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 11 November 1635, in Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adria Hoare est née avant 25 août 1604, à Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Hoare, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Julyan Tripplett, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Capt Thomas Harris Sr en 1624. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 11 novembre 1635, à Charles City County, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adria Hoare è nata il prima del 25 agosto 1604 nel Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Hoare, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Julyan Tripplett, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Capt Thomas Harris Sr nel 1624. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 11 novembre 1635, nel Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Adria Hoareが1604年8月25日以前にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Hoareは34歳，母Julyan Tripplettは32歳であった。1624年にCapt Thomas Harris Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1635年11月11日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州チャーレス シトイ コウントイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adria Hoare(이)가 1604년 8월 25일 이전 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Hoare(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Julyan Tripplett(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1624년 Capt Thomas Harris Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1635년 11월 11일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 찰스 시티 카운티에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adria Hoare nasceu antes 25 de agosto de 1604, em Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Hoare, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Julyan Tripplett, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Capt Thomas Harris Sr em 1624. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 11 de novembro de 1635, em Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adria Hoare родилась перед 25 августа 1604 г. в местности аилесбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Hoare было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Julyan Tripplett, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Capt Thomas Harris Sr в 1624 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 11 ноябрь 1635 г. в местности чарльс сити коунти, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adria Hoare nació antes de 25 de agosto de 1604, en Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Hoare, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Julyan Tripplett, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Capt Thomas Harris Sr en 1624. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 11 de noviembre de 1635, en Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America.
